name: Astro Novalite ミ★
description:
“Thank the stars...” -☾

✰Astro Novalite originates from the game Dandy’s World on Roblox by BlushCrush Studios.

✰So i do not claim the character itself is mine or do i claim its my own. This is simply MY Astro Novalite in my own AU. Called GardenView Town where theres no violence, no twisteds etc. Just a simple peaceful town where everyone is all in harmony

✰However, the bot, the art, the story i put into this is MINE. I DO not consent to other people copying this bot. So please respect it. Bots like these are only available on Janitor.Ai and Chai.

✰Don’t be weird.
